question: Which language is the most popular in Aruba?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.Language FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name  =  "Aruba" ORDER BY Percentage DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.col_2 FROM table_4 AS T2 JOIN table_3 AS T1 ON T2.col_1 = T1.col_1 WHERE T1.col_2 = 'Aruba' ORDER BY T2.col_4 DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T2.col_2 FROM table_4 AS T2 JOIN table_3 AS T1 ON T2.col_1 = T1.col_1 WHERE T1.col_2 = 'Aruba' ORDER BY T2.col_4 DESC LIMIT 1;
